title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!
